# GitHub Copilot — project instructions

> This project uses **CodeDoc**. The single source of truth for agent instructions is [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) at the repository root. Read it first.

**Before changing code**, read the relevant documentation in [`docs/`](../docs/) — start from [`docs/llms.txt`](../docs/llms.txt), which indexes every doc.

**After changing code**, update the matching doc(s) in the same change, as described in [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) under "Documentation update protocol". Treat docs as part of the diff, not an afterthought.
